phrases.intent_en: Ask about the opening hours of the cathedral
phrases.cultural_note: The cathedral is open daily for visitors. Check locally for service times when access may be limited.

responses.phonetic: oo-VAIRT too lay zhoor, duh weet uhr ah dee-nuhf uhr
responses.local: Ouverte tous les jours, de huit heures à dix-neuf heures.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the crypt is located
phrases.cultural_note: The crypt houses the tomb of Saint Bénigne, the martyr who brought Christianity to Dijon in the 2nd century.

responses.english: The crypt is located beneath the cathedral. You can access it through the main entrance.
responses.phonetic: say par lah, zhoost oh boo duh lah roo
responses.local: La crypte se trouve sous la cathédrale. Vous pouvez y accéder par l'entrée principale.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if photos are allowed inside
phrases.cultural_note: Photography is generally allowed in the cathedral, but not during services.

responses.english: Yes, but without flash and not during services.
responses.phonetic: wee, may sahn FLASH ay pah pahn-DAHN lay zoh-FEES
responses.local: Oui, mais sans flash et pas pendant les offices.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is an entry fee to visit
phrases.cultural_note: Entry to the cathedral is free. Donations are appreciated for the upkeep of this historic religious site.

responses.phonetic: say grah-TOO-EE poor too luh MOHND
responses.local: C'est gratuit pour tout le monde.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the toilets are near the cathedral
phrases.text_local: Où sont les toilettes les plus proches ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo son lay twah-LET lay ploo PROHSH
phrases.cultural_note: Public toilets are available near the cathedral square.

responses.english: There are some on the square, behind the cathedral.
responses.phonetic: eel ee ahn ah soor lah PLAHS, deh-RYEHR lah kah-tay-DRAL
responses.local: Il y en a sur la place, derrière la cathédrale.
